# claudeadmin_service_account (Data Source)

Fetches a single service account by ID. Requires OAuth Bearer auth.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claudeadmin_service_account" "ci" {
  id = "svac_01SDCCSbTxrXDpWc1phhtcfK"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)
- `organization_role` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
